questions.question: Explain the servlet lifecycle with its main methods.
expectedPoints: init() method: Called once during servlet initialization
service() method: Called for each client request
destroy() method: Called during servlet termination

questions.question: Compare and contrast different session tracking methods in servlets.
expectedPoints: Cookies: Client-side storage, may be disabled
URL Rewriting: Appends session ID to URL, works without cookies
Hidden Form Fields: Stores session data in hidden form elements
HttpSession: Server-side storage, most powerful method
